summary: Heavy focus on a SaaS crypto trading platform rewrite and AI/ML research for trading signals. Continued development across hardware emulation firmware, Windows Explorer utilities, an on-device LLM Android assistant, and computer vision projects.

items.title: Windows input filter driver
items.description: Built and tested a kernel-level input filtering and injection driver for Windows.

items.title: Android TTS engine implementation
items.description: Started building a custom Android text-to-speech engine with multiple voice and accent features.

items.title: E-ink device firmware expansion
items.description: Extended custom firmware for an e-ink device with a knowledge base app and mesh chat fixes.

items.title: Crypto trading platform rewrite
items.description: Iterated on a SaaS algorithmic trading platform, building out infrastructure, billing, strategy templates, and deployment pipelines.

items.title: ESP32-S3 firmware development
items.description: Developed new firmware variants for a feature-rich mouse and keyboard emulation device.

items.title: Windows Explorer file tagging utility
items.description: Polished a Windows Explorer extension for assigning tags to files and folders, including store publishing workflows.

items.title: Computer vision utility application
items.description: Worked on a personal C++ project combining screen capture, input emulation, and YOLO-based object detection overlays.

items.title: E-ink reader custom firmware
items.description: Enhanced custom firmware for an e-ink device with map rendering, a knowledge base browser, and book processing tools.

items.title: Proxy utility client fork
items.description: Updated a fork of a proxy client with new transport support and API fixes.

items.title: On-device LLM Android assistant
items.description: Built and refined an Android chat assistant with local LLM inference, tool use, and background processing capabilities.

items.title: Crypto price prediction research
items.description: Conducted machine learning experiments on mixture-of-experts architectures for cryptocurrency price prediction.

items.title: E-ink device firmware development
items.description: Started building custom firmware features for an e-ink device, including a map application and knowledge base.

items.title: E-ink Android launcher
items.description: Developed a minimalist note-taking launcher tailored for E-ink Android readers.

items.title: Windows Explorer file tagging utility
items.description: Worked on CI/CD pipelines, Microsoft Store publishing, and CLI features for a Windows file-tagging extension.

items.title: Code intelligence engine
items.description: Built a graph-powered code analysis tool with LSP integration and multi-language support.

items.title: n8n automation node fork
items.description: Maintained a fork of a Telegram integration node for n8n workflow automation.

items.title: Neovim development environment
items.description: Maintained a personal Neovim configuration and dotfiles setup.

items.title: YOLO labeling tool
items.description: Created a minimalistic, browser-based labeling tool for YOLO object detection datasets.

items.title: Computer vision for online poker
items.description: Developed a computer vision pipeline for extracting hand histories and game state from online poker platforms.

items.title: Claude Code n8n integration
items.description: Updated an n8n node integrating the Claude Agent SDK for automated coding tasks.

items.title: Android task management app
items.description: Started building a task management Android application with touch event visualization.

items.title: Crypto trading platform and strategies
items.description: Worked on the early phases of a SaaS crypto trading platform and multiple Freqtrade strategy repositories.

items.title: Telegram automation tooling
items.description: Built a multi-bot Telegram interface for managing Freqtrade trading bots.

items.title: AI coding assistant tool
items.description: Developed an autonomous multi-session AI coding assistant with worktree and git rule management.

items.title: Flutter trading monitor app
items.description: Created a mobile monitoring dashboard for crypto trading bots with charts and profit tracking.

items.title: Content aggregation and forwarding
items.description: Maintained a Telegram-based content aggregation and forwarding utility.

items.title: Crypto trading strategies
items.description: Iterated on algorithmic trading strategies and hyperparameter optimization for Freqtrade.

items.title: AI-powered crypto signal bot
items.description: Built a Telegram bot integrating AI analysis with technical indicators for crypto trading signals.

items.title: ChatGPT Telegram bot
items.description: Maintained a .NET-based Telegram bot for interacting with ChatGPT.
